name: NEXPOINT DIVERSIFIED REAL ESTATE TRUST
summary: -Our Advisory Agreement and Note 14 to our consolidated financial statements for more information. If we internalize our management functions, we may not achieve the perceived benefits of the internalization transaction. In the future, our Board may consider internalizing the functions performed for us by our Adviser by, among other methods, acquiring our Advisers assets.
